entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: Host crop affected by anthracnose disease

entities.name: SORGHUM ANTHRACNOSE
entities.description: A destructive disease caused by Colletotrichum graminicola resulting in grain yield loss

entities.name: COLLETRICHUM GRAMINICOLA
entities.description: Fungal pathogen responsible for causing sorghum anthracnose

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The agricultural output of sorghum affected by anthracnose

entities.name: HOST PLANT RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of the host plant to resist the pathogen, used as a management strategy

entities.name: GENETIC DIVERSITY
entities.description: The variability in the genetic make-up of the pathogen population

entities.name: RFLP
entities.description: Restriction Fragment Length Polymorphism, a reliable but cumbersome molecular tool for studying genetic variability

entities.name: RAPD
entities.description: Random Amplified Polymorphic DNA, a simple and rapid but often non-reproducible molecular tool for studying genetic variability

entities.name: PCR
entities.description: Polymerase Chain Reaction, a method for DNA amplification providing simplicity and speed

entities.name: RESTRICTION ANALYSIS OF INTERGENIC SPACER REGION
entities.description: A technique using PCR and restriction enzymes to study variability in fungi

entities.name: FUSARIUM OXYSPORUM
entities.description: A fungus for which the intergenic spacer region analysis was originally designed

entities.name: PYRENOPHORA GRAMINEA
entities.description: A fungus used in variability studies using restriction analysis of rDNA

entities.name: KPNI
entities.description: A restriction enzyme used for fingerprinting C. graminicola populations

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The geographic region from which C. graminicola isolates were obtained
